{{CargoRelic
|name=Classic of Tea
|class_id=21847
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Lu Yu’s 8th-century tea bible. From leaf cultivation to spiritual brewing in ten chapters.
|fame=49
|art=44
|fth=44
|civ=71
|tech=35
|ss1=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 240<br>Per 5 CIV Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>CIV Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss2=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 320<br>Per 5 CIV Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +96<br>CIV Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss3=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 400<br>Per 5 CIV Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +120<br>CIV Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss4=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 560<br>Per 5 CIV Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +168<br>CIV Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss5=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 720<br>Per 5 CIV Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +216<br>CIV Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss7=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 720<br>Per 5 CIV Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +216<br>CIV Relics Awakened: 100/100<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 560 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Dragon Orb Drops +1.5%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's CIV +10
}}
